# Muhammad, Happy Thanksgiving!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-28 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 342

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today is Thanksgiving Day here in America. It’s a special time
when we gather with our friends and family to give thanks for all
the things that we’re grateful for.

In that spirit, I wanted to take a moment to thank YOU.

When I first started WPBeginner in 2009, I never could have
imagined where that journey would bring me. Since then, I wake up
every day excited about how we can help you do cool things with
WordPress.

I can’t express enough gratitude for this opportunity and for all
your support.

So on this special day, from my family to yours, I want to say
two simple words to you: thank you.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi,
Founder of WPBeginner

P.S. We're offering a very special deal this Black Friday. You
can get a flat 10% OFF on all Pro Services

WordPress deals, here's the complete list 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..H2NeYGVm7utmgUSFNilW4JUPtxcrcvo_JJxOEmcLbGg ).

Cheers!

Here's to you and an amazing 2024!
